# Phase 6 Problems oracle (wolframscript primary).
# Captured by: wolframscript -file external/probes/problems-oracle/capture.wl
# Format: Julia-readable literals.

# (A) Pole-bridge demo (worklog 004; new Phase-6 v1 acceptance):
#       z a^\210\210 {0.5, 0.95, 1.05, 1.4}; pole at z=1.
# (B) FW 2011 Table 5.1 reference values (deferred to v2):
#       u(30)     = 1.095098255959744                  (line 301)
#       u(10^4)   = 21.02530339471055                   (line 301)
#       u(28.261) = 9.876953517025014e6                 (line 372)

# z = 0.5 (BEFORE pole at z=1) -- closed-form + NDSolve cross-check.
u_at_0_5             = 4.0044646690030875
up_at_0_5            = 15.964278048239492
u_at_0_5_via_NDSolve  = 4.0044646690030852
up_at_0_5_via_NDSolve = 15.964278048239479

# z = 0.95 (NEAR pole, just BEFORE z=1) -- closed-form + NDSolve.
u_at_0_95             = 400.00000044642857
up_at_0_95            = 15999.999964285714
u_at_0_95_via_NDSolve  = 400.00000044642635
up_at_0_95_via_NDSolve = 15999.999964285581

# z = 1.05 (PAST pole at z=1) -- closed-form sole primary source;
# mpmath.odefun cannot integrate through the pole.  PadA~(c) bridges it.
u_at_1_05  = 400.00000044642857
up_at_1_05 = -15999.999964285714
# z = 1.05 at 80-digit precision (for BigFloat-256 round-trip).
u_at_1_05_80dps_str  = "400.00000044642857146689805730209434335396271221358299108294803421544061930158100"
up_at_1_05_80dps_str = "-15999.99996428571427804895996788240039359399706995053158246775877918937602098080000"

# z = 1.4 (further past pole) -- closed-form sole primary source.
u_at_1_4  = 6.2518286125821094
up_at_1_4 = -31.231713256866332
# NDSolve restart from closed-form IC at z=1.05, integrated to z=1.4.
u_at_1_4_via_NDSolve_restart  = 6.2518286125821094
up_at_1_4_via_NDSolve_restart = -31.231713256866332

# Test 6.1.1 -- u(30) and u'(30); FW reference 1.095098255959744.
u_at_30        = 1.0950982559597442
up_at_30       = 1.8036472390925038
u_at_30_FW_ref = 1.095098255959744

# Test 6.1.2 -- u(10^4) and u'(10^4); FW reference 21.02530339471055.
u_at_10000        = 21.02530339471055
up_at_10000       = 192.81096176198322
u_at_10000_FW_ref = 21.02530339471055

# Test 6.1.3 -- u(28.261) (high on pole wall); FW ref 9.876953517025014e6.
u_at_28261        = 9.8769535170250145e6
up_at_28261       = -6.2081830038720978e10
u_at_28261_FW_ref = 9.876953517025014e6

# Test 6.1.4 -- u(30) at 80-digit precision (for BigFloat-256 BigFloat 1e-65 tol).
# Source: N[WeierstrassP[30 + c1, {0, c2}], 80].
u_at_30_80dps_str  = "1.09509825595974419974111772639777758196771220725452932357516426365288703175906"
up_at_30_80dps_str = "1.80364723909250382245152432181975049259182110740564572463437046306552145475353"

# Test 6.1.5 -- dense interp target u(7.123) for problem 6.1.1.
u_at_7_123  = 2.2364109999459131
up_at_7_123 = -6.5377323327122966

# FW 2011 ICs (FW2011_*.md:292-295):
u_0_FW   = 1.071822516416917
up_0_FW  = 1.710337353176786
c_1_FW   = -1
c_2_FW   = 2
